data.body:
## Updated Success Criteria (aligned with Revised Approach)

The original SC referenced an --exclude-file flag approach that was superseded by the revised approach in comment 2. Updated criteria to match the implemented RED-zone tolerance mechanism:

- ✅ suite-engine.sh supports SUITE_TEST_INDEX env var; when set, RED-zone-only failures are marked TOLERATED (not counted as failures)
- ✅ When SUITE_TEST_INDEX is not set, suite-engine behavior is identical to before (no behavioral change)
- ✅ CI sets SUITE_TEST_INDEX to .test-index for Hook Tests and Script Tests jobs, enabling RED-zone tolerance
- ✅ CI Script Tests job passes when the only failures are RED-zone marked tests
- ✅ Tolerated tests are counted in summary (PASSED: N  FAILED: N  TOLERATED: N) so their existence remains visible
